research_goal: Smoke test Clink UAT analytics login and first-screen product walkthrough.

products.name: Clink UAT Analytics
products.notes: Credentials are read from CLINK_UAT_ACCOUNT_USERNAME or CLINK_UAT_ACCOUNT_EMAIL and CLINK_UAT_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD.

scenarios.title: Login and inspect analytics entry
scenarios.persona: Product manager validating the analytics dashboard
scenarios.goal: Confirm that a test account can enter the analytics page and identify the first-screen product experience.
steps: If redirected to login, sign in with the provided safe credentials
Wait for the analytics dashboard or first authenticated page to load
Identify the primary navigation, filters, empty states, charts, or tables visible on the first screen
Summarize any blockers, confusing copy, loading delays, or missing guidance
success_criteria: The account can reach an authenticated page
The analytics page or closest available dashboard state is visible
The first-screen purpose and next action are understandable
No destructive action, payment, account mutation, or data export is performed
